integration_validation_v2.gap: FEMS V1 'end-to-end' proof composes every surface through deterministic in-memory adapters; the single e2e test touches no real PG/EventLedger/ArtifactStore despite the WP claiming Handshake-native managed-resource integration.
integration_validation_v2.evidence: tests/fems_integration_e2e_tests.rs:3-4 header 'deterministic in-memory adapters'; FixtureFems (line 111), StubTier (227), TraceSourceStub (280), SpawnFixtureLedger (345), InMemoryFemsAccessor (25); grep confirms zero PgPool/sqlx/ensure_schema/AtelierStore in the file; only one #[tokio::test].

integration_validation_v3.evidence: Proof tests/atelier_fems_postgres_e2e_tests.rs mt168_fems_feedback_chain_persists_through_postgres_stores: FEMS V1 chain on managed PG - CapsuleRecorder over production PostgresKernelActionSubmitter with kernel_event_ledger assert; PostgresMemoryCapsuleStore save + FRESH-instance re-read; OutcomeFeedbackLoop ledger assert; PinIpcService pin re-read via FRESH submitter; HygieneJobRunner durable consolidation/prune candidates with pinned-item protection on ledger; trace export leg via PostgresTraceSource with real ArtifactStore secret redaction + receipt event. PG+EventLedger+ArtifactStore all touched through production types.
integration_validation_v3.gap: Residual: retrieval input corpus (FixtureFems) and hygiene stats view (InMemoryFemsAccessor) remain in-memory INPUT fixtures; a PG FemsAccessor exists (PostgresBitemporalMemoryIndex, hygiene.rs:711) but is not used for the stats leg. Input-only; every persistence/read surface in the proof path is managed PG.
integration_validation_v3.basis: v3 adversarial per-MT review of remediated deliverable + runtime proof via full-crate managed-PG sweep and kernel-builder fresh-DB proof logs

risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.
